title: Enable posting/commenting without profiles and show missing authors as Guest

requirements.summary: Allow authenticated users to compose and submit posts even when no UserProfile exists.
acceptanceCriteria: The post composer textarea, attachment buttons, and Post submit button are usable even when the current user has no profile.
Submitting a post without a profile attempts the backend `createPost` call and shows success/error toasts based on the result (no frontend-side "Please create a profile before posting" hard-block).

file_operations.description: Remove the profile-based gating in the post composer (no early-return toast, no disabling textarea/attachments/submit when `useGetCallerUserProfile()` is null). Keep existing validation for empty content and retain success/error toasts driven by the `useCreatePost` mutation.

requirements.summary: Allow authenticated users to write and submit comments even when no UserProfile exists.
acceptanceCriteria: When comments are expanded on a post, the comment input and submit action are available even if the current user has no profile.
Submitting a comment without a profile triggers the existing comment mutation and updates the comments list via existing query invalidation.

file_operations.description: Remove profile-based UI gating for commenting: always render the comment input/submit controls when comments are expanded, and remove the `currentUserProfile` check that blocks `handleCommentSubmit`. Preserve existing trim checks, use of `onComment`, and existing React Query invalidation behavior via the `useAddComment` hook.

requirements.summary: Show author name as "Guest" for posts/comments whose author has no profile available to the frontend, while keeping avatar fallbacks safe.
acceptanceCriteria: In the feed UI, posts authored by principals without a profile show author name "Guest" instead of "Unknown user" (or a principal placeholder).
In the comments UI, comments authored by principals without a profile show author name "Guest" instead of "Unknown user" (or a principal placeholder).
Avatar fallbacks remain functional for users without profiles (no runtime errors when profile is missing).

file_operations.description: Update the unknown-user display label utility so missing-profile authors display the placeholder name "Guest" (replacing the current "Unknown user" fallback).

Ensure post/comment author display uses the updated fallback label for missing profiles, and adjust avatar fallback initials for missing profiles (e.g., use a safe guest fallback) to avoid runtime errors when profile is null.
